- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Project type: python-project
	Language/frameworks: Django + DRF + PostgreSQL

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Created Django project `config` and app `marketplace` in current workspace.

- [x] Customize the Project
	Implemented marketplace models, serializers, viewsets, routers, admin, permissions, env config, and docs.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions required.

- [x] Compile the Project
	Dependencies installed, migrations generated, `manage.py check` passed.

- [x] Create and Run Task
	Skipped (not required for this Python backend workflow).

- [x] Launch the Project
	Server launch validated with `manage.py runserver`.


- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README and this file updated, HTML comments removed.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
